description: Product Description A rich floral fragrance with a distinctive style of luxury and glamour. This bold perfume is for women who bring luxury into their everyday lives. Giorgio is a favourite classic scent rightfully described as ‚ÄúBeverly Hills in a bottle‚Äù. A mix of zesty bergamot and orange flower blends with a floral heart of tuberose and gardenia to create a distinctively elegant signature. As day turns into evening, experience the sensuality and glamour unfold. Ingredients INGREDIENTS: ALCOHOL DENAT‚Äû WATER/AQUA/EAU, PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, BHT, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, CINNAMAL, BENZYL ALCOHOL, BENZYL BENZOATE, BENZYL SALICYLATE,CINNAMYL ALCOHOL, CITRAL, CITRONELLOL, EUGENOL, GERANIOL, HEXYL CINNAMAL, HYDROXYCITRONELLAL, LIMONENE, LINALOOL. Directions Spray Giorgio Beverly Hills Fragrance Mist all over body and hair Do not spray on eyes Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
